summary: AgentForge v4.5 - Quick Deploy, Notifications, and System Visualization testing complete. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend Deploy tab shows Quick Deploy section with Vercel/Railway buttons. CommandCenter shows all 12 sub-tabs including 3D Map with SystemVisualization component.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/deploy/config - returns configured platforms (vercel, railway, itch, discord_notifications, email_notifications)
✅ POST /api/deploy/{project_id}/quick/vercel - validates project exists (returns 404 for invalid project)
✅ POST /api/deploy/{project_id}/quick/railway - validates project exists (returns 404 for invalid project)
✅ POST /api/deploy/{project_id}/quick/vercel - with valid project, returns deployment info
✅ POST /api/deploy/{project_id}/quick/railway - with valid project, returns deployment info
✅ POST /api/notifications/{project_id}/test - sends Discord notification successfully
✅ GET /api/visualization/{project_id}/map - returns nodes, edges, clusters, agent_positions
✅ GET /api/visualization/{project_id}/map - validates project (returns 404 for invalid)
✅ GET /api/build-farm/status - returns worker status (total_workers, active_workers, queued_jobs, running_jobs)
✅ GET /api/knowledge/all - returns knowledge entries list
✅ GET /api/knowledge/stats - returns total_entries, total_reuses, by_type, by_category
✅ GET /api/knowledge/search - searches knowledge by query
✅ GET /api/deploy/platforms - returns all deployment platforms (vercel, railway, itch)
✅ Frontend: Deploy tab with data-testid='deploy-tab' renders
✅ Frontend: Quick Deploy section with input data-testid='quick-deploy-name' renders
✅ Frontend: Vercel button data-testid='quick-deploy-vercel' renders
✅ Frontend: Railway button data-testid='quick-deploy-railway' renders
✅ Frontend: Command tab with data-testid='command-tab' renders
✅ Frontend: CommandCenter with data-testid='command-center' renders
✅ Frontend: 3D Map tab with data-testid='cmd-viz-tab' renders
✅ Frontend: SystemVisualization with data-testid='system-visualization' renders
✅ Frontend: CommandCenter sub-tabs visible: Mission, Goal Loop, Idea→Reality, Knowledge, Autopsy, Debug, Time, Ideas, SaaS, Farm, Agents+, 3D Map
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py is 7690 lines - consider migrating to modular structure in /app/backend/routes/
Quick deploy endpoints make actual API calls to Vercel/Railway - deployment success depends on API key validity and account limits
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgentForge v4.5 deployment and visualization features fully tested. Quick deploy endpoints (POST /api/deploy/{project_id}/quick/vercel and /quick/railway) use server-side API keys from backend/.env. Discord notifications work via DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL. System visualization (GET /api/visualization/{project_id}/map) returns file graph data. Frontend has Deploy tab with Quick Deploy UI and Command tab with 12 sub-tabs including 3D Map showing SystemVisualization component.
